summary: Connect to SceneTree node_added signal to track new nodes
prompt: Modify the script below to connect to the SceneTree's `node_added` signal in `_ready()`. When a node is added to the scene tree, if it is in the group 'enemy', add it to the local `_tracked_enemies` Array. Also connect to `node_removed` and remove any enemy from `_tracked_enemies` when removed. Initialize `_tracked_enemies` as an `Array[Node]`.
evaluation_notes: get_tree().node_added.connect(...) is correct. The signal passes Node not Node2D. node_removed similarly. Must check is_in_group('enemy'). erase() to remove from array.
